name: Selma Bajrami
description:
'''Selma Bajrami''' ({{IPA|bs|sělma bajrǎːmi|pron}}; born 4 July 1980) is a [[Bosnia and Herzegovina|Bosnia]]n singer. She began her professional music career with the release of her debut album ''[[Kad suza ne bude...]]'' (1998) at the age of 18. To date, Bajrami has released nine studio albums and is among the most notable popular music performers from [[Bosnia and Herzegovina]].

She is known for her versatility across music genres, from [[pop-folk]] through [[Pop music|pop]] to [[turbo-folk]], and often incorporates electronic, urban, and [[dance-pop]] elements into her songs. She is also recognized for her strong vocals and energetic, dance-oriented live performances.
